# Logrus

[![Build Status](https://github.com/sirupsen/logrus/workflows/CI/badge.svg)](https://github.com/sirupsen/logrus/actions?query=workflow%3ACI) [![Go Reference](https://pkg.go.dev/badge/github.com/sirupsen/logrus.svg)](https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/sirupsen/logrus)

A structured logger for Go.
